context: Tests whether the agent correctly extends an SFRA controller using the prescribed layering pattern (server.extend + module.superModule + server.append), uses res.getViewData/setViewData to pass extra data, and creates an ISML template with isdecorate layout, correct isprint encoding for trusted HTML, and proper asset inclusion.

checklist.name: module.superModule reference
checklist.description: The Cart.js controller uses `var page = module.superModule` (or equivalent) to reference the base controller before calling server.extend(page)

checklist.name: server.extend called
checklist.description: The controller calls `server.extend(page)` with the superModule reference to inherit the base controller's routes

checklist.name: server.append used
checklist.description: The loyalty points logic is added via `server.append('Show', ...)` rather than `server.replace` or by redefining the route with server.get/server.post

checklist.name: getViewData and setViewData
checklist.description: The appended route handler calls `res.getViewData()` to retrieve existing view data and `res.setViewData(viewData)` to inject the loyalty points before calling next()

checklist.name: next() called in handlers
checklist.description: Every route handler function ends with `next()` (or `return next()` in early-exit branches) — no handler is missing a next() call

checklist.name: Use strict in controller
checklist.description: Cart.js starts with `'use strict';` at the top of the file

checklist.name: isdecorate layout in template
checklist.description: The ISML template uses `<isdecorate template="common/layout/page">` (or a similar standard layout decorator) as the outer wrapper

checklist.name: isprint encoding off for body
checklist.description: The ISML template renders the content asset body using `<isprint value="${pdict.content.body}" encoding="off"/>` (encoding='off') to avoid double-escaping trusted HTML

checklist.name: assets.addCss and addJs
checklist.description: The ISML template includes an <isscript> block that calls assets.addCss() and assets.addJs() to register the page-specific CSS and JS files

checklist.name: module.exports = server.exports()
checklist.description: The Cart.js controller ends with `module.exports = server.exports();`

checklist.name: No server.replace used
checklist.description: The controller does NOT use `server.replace` anywhere; only server.append (and optionally server.prepend) are used for modifying existing routes
